variants: Olivia Chang is a graduate of Noble Hollow College, where she studied languages. Currently, she works at Osprey Sky Transport, utilizing her knowledge of Estonian grammar in her daily responsibilities. In her spare time, Olivia actively participates in Literacy Outreach to Heatherwood, championing the cause of literacy in her community. Her literary contributions have been featured in the Sunrise Canopy Imprint, underscoring her commitment to both language and civic engagement.
